title: Senior Backend Engineer (Python)
description: We're hiring a Senior Backend Engineer to lead the design of our payment infrastructure. You'll work with a team of 4 engineers, own the API roadmap, and partner with product. Strong Python required.

title: Mid-level Backend Engineer (Node.js)
description: Join a team of 6 building a high-throughput logistics platform. You'll own services in TypeScript/Node, design event-driven flows, and contribute to our Kafka pipelines. Mentoring opportunities available.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer (React)
description: Build the next generation of our analytics dashboard. You'll own the React/Next.js codebase, drive performance optimization, and collaborate closely with our designers. Remote-friendly across EU timezones.

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description: End-to-end ownership of features across our product. Backend in Python (FastAPI), frontend in React. You'll work directly with the CTO on architecture decisions for our Series A scale-up.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Help us build the ML platform behind our personalization engine. You'll design training pipelines, deploy models to production, and own metrics. Strong Python and PyTorch required.

title: DevOps / Site Reliability Engineer
description: Drive reliability of our multi-region Kubernetes platform. Own incident response, design observability, automate everything. Remote-only role across EU timezones.

title: Senior iOS Engineer
description: Own our flagship iOS app (1M+ MAU). Swift/SwiftUI codebase, push for testing culture, mentor 2 mid-level engineers. App Store featured product.

title: Product Designer
description: Design product experiences for our B2B SaaS. From research to prototyping to delivery. You'll partner with PMs and engineering leads. Figma is your home.

title: Staff Full-Stack Engineer (Remote)
description: Lead architecture for our developer platform. Full ownership: TypeScript backend, React frontend, infrastructure. Reports to VP Eng. Remote-first company, no office requirement.

title: Junior Backend Engineer (Python)
description: Join our growing team as a Junior Backend Engineer. You'll learn from senior engineers, contribute to our Django monolith, and grow into a mid-level role within 18 months. Onsite role with mentoring focus.
